readme.purpose: Profile-specific deterministic market shocks layered on top of Monte Carlo returns. Use these to model known or assumed macro events at specific years.
readme.tax_note: Shocks affect portfolio returns only — they do NOT directly create a tax event. Taxes are computed on income (withdrawals, conversions, dividends), not on unrealized portfolio value changes. A shock may indirectly affect taxes by triggering bad-market withdrawal sequencing (switching which account is drained) if the drawdown crosses the threshold in economicglobal.json.

mode_options.augment: Add these events on top of system_shocks.json preset events.
mode_options.replace: Ignore system_shocks.json entirely — only these profile events apply.

event_fields.start_year: Simulation year the shock begins (1-indexed). Year 1 = current_age + 1.
event_fields.start_quarter: Quarter within start_year the shock begins. Options: 1, 2, 3, 4.
event_fields.depth: Maximum drawdown as a fraction. E.g. 0.30 = 30% peak-to-trough loss.
event_fields.dip_quarters: Number of quarters to reach maximum depth from shock start.
event_fields.recovery_quarters: Number of quarters to recover from trough back to recovery_to target.

override_mode_options.strict: This shock overrides any concurrent stochastic return for this class — deterministic only.
override_mode_options.augment: Shock is additive on top of the stochastic return — can amplify or dampen.

recovery_to_options.baseline: Recover to the pre-shock trend line (mean-reversion).
recovery_to_options.none: Stop at trough level — no recovery above trough.

type_options.poly: Polynomial curve. alpha > 1 = slow start then sharp drop. alpha < 1 = sharp start then gradual.
type_options.exp: Exponential curve. lambda controls the decay rate.

event_fields.coimpact_down: Other asset classes pulled down sympathetically during the dip. mode: 'limited' (only listed classes), 'broad' (all equity-like classes), 'none'. scale: fraction of primary shock depth applied to co-impacted classes.
event_fields.corecovery_up: Other classes lifted during the recovery phase. Same mode/scale options. organic: true = the co-recovering class follows its own profile shape. organic_profile: the shape parameters for that organic recovery.
event_fields.correlated_to: For co-movement: this class tracks another class's shock scaled by 'scale'. Used for commodity-to-equity correlation.
event_fields.scale: Fraction of the correlated class's movement applied to this class.
